6-mddm.dose_note: NOTE: These dosages are based off the potency of the drug and converted to what we have with morphine's dose. Further research is required for dosing.
6-mddm.name: 6-mddm

properties.dose: Light: 125ug Common: 187-250ug Strong: 375ug+ | NOTE: These dosages are based off the potency and converted to what we have with Morphine's dose. Further research is required.
properties.effects: Euphoria, Dry Mouth, Mood lift, Itchiness, Relaxant, Constipation, Pupil constriction, Analgesia.
properties.summary: Semisynthetic opioid that is a derivative of Hydromorphone with little history of human use. Roughly around ~80x the potency of Morphine. Structurally related to Desomorphine.
